app_subtitle: USM key recovery, extraction, MP4 output (MKV fallback), supports USM parsing/transcoding for all MHY secondary titles, and includes a BLB versions viewer

usage_content:
Quick Start
1. Select mode: single file or batch folder.
2. Pick one or more .usm files (single mode) or a folder (batch mode).
3. Click Run.
4. Wait for file list and progress to finish.
5. Open Export Video to generate MP4/MKV if needed.

Detailed Workflow
- Input: Use Browse to pick source files.
- Output: Leave empty to use default output folder.
- Settings: Open More Features for fast mode, extract-only, and manual key.
- Logs: Open Logs to inspect processing and FFmpeg details.
- Reports: Export all reports or index after processing finishes.

Video Export
1. Click Export Video after extraction finishes.
2. Choose format (MP4/MKV) and output folder.
3. Select audio tracks and subtitle strategy (off/local/online).
4. Choose export strategy: container, burn, or hybrid.
5. Click Start Export and monitor per-file and overall progress.

BLK Versions
1. Enable "Parse blk" first, then load BLK file and open versions viewer.
2. Search, edit, sync keys from processed USM rows if needed.
3. Save versions.json when done.
4. 26236578.blk path hints:
   - CNRelWin: {game_root}\YuanShen_Data\StreamingAssets\VideoAssets\26236578.blk
   - OSRelWin: {game_root}\GenshinImpact_Data\StreamingAssets\VideoAssets\26236578.blk

Tips
- Use local subtitle files when online subtitles are unstable.
- Keep logs for troubleshooting failed exports.
- If FFmpeg fails, verify encoder availability (e.g. libx264).
credits_content:
This project uses the following open source projects:

1. FFmpeg
- Official source: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg
- Build used by this project: https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds

2. USM key parsing algorithm
- https://github.com/Senkin219/UsmDiviner

3. Genshin USM subtitle repository
- https://gitlab.com/Dimbreath/AnimeGameData/-/tree/master/Subtitle

4. Wav stream parser vgmstream
- https://github.com/vgmstream/vgmstream

5. Inspiration for blk parsing core algorithm: AnimeStudio
- https://github.com/Escartem/AnimeStudio
opt_disable_multiprocessing_tooltip: Disable parallel processing, use single process only
opt_fast_key_crack_tooltip: Use fast algorithm for key recovery
opt_extract_only_tooltip: Extract audio only, skip key recovery
opt_keep_intermediate_audio_tooltip: Keep intermediate audio files during extraction
opt_mux_mkv_tooltip: Export MP4 directly from extracted streams; create MKV only when MP4 export fails
